use tree_sitter::{Parser, Query, QueryCursor};

fn find_functions(source: &str, tree: &tree_sitter::Tree) -> Vec<String> {
    let language = tree_sitter_rust::LANGUAGE.into();
    let query = Query::new(&language, "(function_item name: (identifier) @name)").unwrap();
    let mut cursor = QueryCursor::new();
    let matches = cursor.matches(&query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes());

    matches
        .map(|m| {
            let node = m.captures[0].node;
            source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()].to_string()
        })
        .collect()
}

fn find_identifiers(source: &str, tree: &tree_sitter::Tree) -> Vec<String> {
    let language = tree_sitter_rust::LANGUAGE.into();
    let query = Query::new(&language, "(identifier) @id").unwrap();
    let mut cursor = QueryCursor::new();
    let matches = cursor.matches(&query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes());

    matches
        .map(|m| {
            let node = m.captures[0].node;
            source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()].to_string()
        })
        .collect()
}

fn find_calls(source: &str, tree: &tree_sitter::Tree) -> Vec<String> {
    let language = tree_sitter_rust::LANGUAGE.into();
    let query = Query::new(&language, "(call_expression function: (identifier) @func)").unwrap();
    let mut cursor = QueryCursor::new();
    cursor
        .matches(&query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes())
        .map(|m| {
            let node = m.captures[0].node;
            source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()].to_string()
        })
        .collect()
}
